logistics-ejb/src/main/java/br/com/esign.general_idea: Add explicit generic type parameter to RouteChooser variable declaration to improve type safety.
Remove explicit cast to ChosenRoute since the generic type parameter now provides compile-time type information.
Change the default package-private constructor to public to ensure accessibility for serialization frameworks.
Change default constructor visibility from package-private to public.
Simplify array creation in Arrays.asList by removing explicit array type declaration.
Change the default constructor visibility from package-private to public, likely required by the new ORM serialization/deserialization mechanism.
Remove the dependency injection of the now-obsolete MorphiaAdapter class.
Add Java Util Logging statements to track CRUD operations for better observability.
Change method signatures to accept String identifiers instead of entity objects for cleaner API usage.
Simplify route addition logic by using Morphia's object mapping instead of manual BasicDBObject construction.
Add explicit serialVersionUID to ensure serialization compatibility across JVM versions.
Remove redundant containment check before removing a route, relying on the DAO or subsequent logic to handle existence.

logistics-ejb/src/test/java/br/com/esign.general_idea: Add explicit generic type parameter to the RouteChooser variable declaration to improve type safety and clarity.
Remove unused JUnit 4 ExpectedException rule and its imports to clean up the test class.
logistics-ejb/src/test/java/br/com/esign.human_impl: Removed `@Rule public ExpectedException expectedEx` and associated imports.

logistics-ejb/src/test/java/br/com/esign.general_idea: Delete the test method for removeRoutesMap which is no longer needed or relevant.
